disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Exposure Risk Higher Than Believed In US , Study Warns
updates.summary_zh: 研究警告美国汉坦病毒暴露风险高于预期。

updates.title_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰邮轮一名船员确诊汉坦病毒，已隔离。

updates.title_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 官员通报奥马哈邮轮汉坦病毒隔离最新情况。

updates.title_en: Canada's top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today - CTV News
updates.body_en: Canada's top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today CTV News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席医生将更新埃博拉和汉坦病毒信息。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus : WHO Confirms New Case on MV Hondius
updates.summary_zh: WHO确认MV Hondius邮轮新增汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Canada's top doctor takes questions on Ebola, hantavirus - CBC
updates.body_en: Canada's top doctor takes questions on Ebola, hantavirus CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席医生就埃博拉和汉坦病毒答问。

updates.title_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada - St. Catharines Standard
updates.body_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada St. Catharines Standard
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大尼亚加拉官员称风险低，但监测汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮关联汉坦病毒病例升至12例，一名船员阳性。

updates.title_en: WHO says new hantavirus case among Hondius ship crew
updates.summary_zh: WHO称Hondius船船员出现新汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Officials to share update on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha
updates.summary_zh: 官员将更新奥马哈邮轮汉坦病毒隔离情况。

updates.title_en: LIVE AT 9:15 A.M.: Officials to brief on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: LIVE AT 9:15 A.M.: Officials to brief on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 奥马哈官员将简报邮轮汉坦病毒隔离情况。

updates.title_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮汉坦病毒病例增至 12 例。

updates.title_en: WHO Africa head warns against underestimating risk of Ebola spread
updates.summary_zh: WHO 非洲负责人警告勿低估埃博拉传播风险。

updates.title_en: 20 / 20 Biolabs Commences Emergency Planning for Ebola & Hantavirus Lab Testing if Outbreak Creates Overflow Demand
updates.summary_zh: 20/20 Biolabs 启动埃博拉和汉坦病毒检测应急计划。

updates.title_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: WHO 敦促新病例后持续监测汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: All 27 on board Hondius test negative for hantavirus
updates.summary_zh: Hondius 号上 27 人汉坦病毒检测均阴性。
